민수기 26:1.content: After the plague, Yahweh spoke to Moses and to Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest, saying,

민수기 26:2.content: “Take a census of all the congregation of the children of Israel, from twenty years old and upward, by their fathers’ houses, all who are able to go out to war in Israel.”

민수기 26:3.content: Moses and Eleazar the priest spoke with them in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,

민수기 26:4.content: “Take a census, from twenty years old and upward, as Yahweh commanded Moses and the children of Israel.” These are those that came out of the land of Egypt.

민수기 26:5.content: Reuben, the firstborn of Israel; the sons of Reuben: of Hanoch, the family of the Hanochites; of Pallu, the family of the Palluites;

민수기 26:6.content: of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites; of Carmi, the family of the Carmites.

민수기 26:7.content: These are the families of the Reubenites; and those who were counted of them were forty-three thousand seven hundred thirty.

민수기 26:9.content: The sons of Eliab: Nemuel, Dathan, and Abiram. These are that Dathan and Abiram who were called by the congregation, who rebelled against Moses and against Aaron in the company of Korah when they rebelled against Yahweh;

민수기 26:10.content: and the earth opened its mouth, and swallowed them up together with Korah when that company died; at the time the fire devoured two hundred fifty men, and they became a sign.

민수기 26:11.content: Notwithstanding, the sons of Korah didn’t die.

민수기 26:12.content: The sons of Simeon after their families: of Nemuel, the family of the Nemuelites; of Jamin, the family of the Jaminites; of Jachin, the family of the Jachinites;

민수기 26:13.content: of Zerah, the family of the Zerahites; of Shaul, the family of the Shaulites.

민수기 26:14.content: These are the families of the Simeonites, twenty-two thousand two hundred.

민수기 26:15.content: The sons of Gad after their families: of Zephon, the family of the Zephonites; of Haggi, the family of the Haggites; of Shuni, the family of the Shunites;

민수기 26:16.content: of Ozni, the family of the Oznites; of Eri, the family of the Erites;

민수기 26:17.content: of Arod, the family of the Arodites; of Areli, the family of the Arelites.

민수기 26:18.content: These are the families of the sons of Gad according to those who were counted of them, forty thousand and five hundred.

민수기 26:19.content: The sons of Judah: Er and Onan. Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan.

민수기 26:20.content: The sons of Judah after their families were: of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites; of Perez, the family of the Perezites; of Zerah, the family of the Zerahites.

민수기 26:21.content: The sons of Perez were: of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites; of Hamul, the family of the Hamulites.

민수기 26:22.content: These are the families of Judah according to those who were counted of them, seventy-six thousand five hundred.

민수기 26:23.content: The sons of Issachar after their families: of Tola, the family of the Tolaites; of Puvah, the family of the Punites;

민수기 26:24.content: of Jashub, the family of the Jashubites; of Shimron, the family of the Shimronites.

민수기 26:25.content: These are the families of Issachar according to those who were counted of them, sixty-four thousand three hundred.

민수기 26:26.content: The sons of Zebulun after their families: of Sered, the family of the Seredites; of Elon, the family of the Elonites; of Jahleel, the family of the Jahleelites.

민수기 26:27.content: These are the families of the Zebulunites according to those who were counted of them, sixty thousand five hundred.

민수기 26:28.content: The sons of Joseph after their families: Manasseh and Ephraim.

민수기 26:29.content: The sons of Manasseh: of Machir, the family of the Machirites; and Machir became the father of Gilead; of Gilead, the family of the Gileadites.

민수기 26:30.content: These are the sons of Gilead: of Iezer, the family of the Iezerites; of Helek, the family of the Helekites;

민수기 26:31.content: and Asriel, the family of the Asrielites; and Shechem, the family of the Shechemites;

민수기 26:32.content: and Shemida, the family of the Shemidaites; and Hepher, the family of the Hepherites.

민수기 26:33.content: Zelophehad the son of Hepher had no sons, but daughters: and the names of the daughters of Zelophehad were Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

민수기 26:34.content: These are the families of Manasseh. Those who were counted of them were fifty-two thousand seven hundred.

민수기 26:35.content: These are the sons of Ephraim after their families: of Shuthelah, the family of the Shuthelahites; of Becher, the family of the Becherites; of Tahan, the family of the Tahanites.

민수기 26:36.content: These are the sons of Shuthelah: of Eran, the family of the Eranites.

민수기 26:37.content: These are the families of the sons of Ephraim according to those who were counted of them, thirty-two thousand five hundred. These are the sons of Joseph after their families.

민수기 26:38.content: The sons of Benjamin after their families: of Bela, the family of the Belaites; of Ashbel, the family of the Ashbelites; of Ahiram, the family of the Ahiramites;

민수기 26:39.content: of Shephupham, the family of the Shuphamites; of Hupham, the family of the Huphamites.

민수기 26:40.content: The sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: the family of the Ardites; and of Naaman, the family of the Naamites.

민수기 26:41.content: These are the sons of Benjamin after their families; and those who were counted of them were forty-five thousand six hundred.

민수기 26:42.content: These are the sons of Dan after their families: of Shuham, the family of the Shuhamites. These are the families of Dan after their families.

민수기 26:43.content: All the families of the Shuhamites, according to those who were counted of them, were sixty-four thousand four hundred.

민수기 26:44.content: The sons of Asher after their families: of Imnah, the family of the Imnites; of Ishvi, the family of the Ishvites; of Beriah, the family of the Berites.

민수기 26:45.content: Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the family of the Heberites; of Malchiel, the family of the Malchielites.

민수기 26:46.content: The name of the daughter of Asher was Serah.

민수기 26:47.content: These are the families of the sons of Asher according to those who were counted of them, fifty-three thousand and four hundred.

민수기 26:48.content: The sons of Naphtali after their families: of Jahzeel, the family of the Jahzeelites; of Guni, the family of the Gunites;

민수기 26:49.content: of Jezer, the family of the Jezerites; of Shillem, the family of the Shillemites.

민수기 26:50.content: These are the families of Naphtali according to their families; and those who were counted of them were forty-five thousand four hundred.

민수기 26:51.content: These are those who were counted of the children of Israel, six hundred one thousand seven hundred thirty.

민수기 26:53.content: “To these the land shall be divided for an inheritance according to the number of names.

민수기 26:54.content: To the more you shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer you shall give the less inheritance. To everyone according to those who were counted of him shall his inheritance be given.

민수기 26:55.content: Notwithstanding, the land shall be divided by lot. According to the names of the tribes of their fathers they shall inherit.

민수기 26:56.content: According to the lot shall their inheritance be divided between the more and the fewer.”

민수기 26:57.content: These are those who were counted of the Levites after their families: of Gershon, the family of the Gershonites; of Kohath, the family of the Kohathites; of Merari, the family of the Merarites.

민수기 26:58.content: These are the families of Levi: the family of the Libnites, the family of the Hebronites, the family of the Mahlites, the family of the Mushites, and the family of the Korahites. Kohath became the father of Amram.

민수기 26:59.content: The name of Amram’s wife was Jochebed, the daughter of Levi, who was born to Levi in Egypt. She bore to Amram Aaron and Moses, and Miriam their sister.

민수기 26:60.content: To Aaron were born Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.

민수기 26:61.content: Nadab and Abihu died when they offered strange fire before Yahweh.

민수기 26:62.content: Those who were counted of them were twenty-three thousand, every male from a month old and upward; for they were not counted among the children of Israel, because there was no inheritance given them among the children of Israel.

민수기 26:63.content: These are those who were counted by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who counted the children of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

민수기 26:64.content: But among these there was not a man of them who were counted by Moses and Aaron the priest, who counted the children of Israel in the wilderness of Sinai.

민수기 26:65.content: For Yahweh had said of them, “They shall surely die in the wilderness.” There was not a man left of them, except Caleb the son of Jephunneh, and Joshua the son of Nun.
